channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: Registrar of Companies moves to dissolve 69 businesses in Kenya
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The Registrar of Companies has issued a notice to dissolve 69 firms unless they meet statutory obligations within a three-month window to avoid removal.
item.content:encoded: The Registrar of Companies has issued a notice to dissolve 69 firms unless they meet statutory obligations within a three-month window to avoid removal.

item.title: Miss P addresses claims about being signed to Saldido International

item.description: Singer Miss P explains her history at Saldido International and clarifies that her vocal talent was the main reason Willy Paul signed her.
item.content:encoded: Singer Miss P explains her history at Saldido International and clarifies that her vocal talent was the main reason Willy Paul signed her.

item.title: Chelsea fans vent frustration after FA Cup defeat to Manchester City
item.dc:creator: Jona Munyi
item.description: Chelsea supporters have criticized the team's squad depth and recruitment strategy following a narrow defeat against Manchester City in the FA Cup.

item.title: NLC Gazettes Land Acquisition for Roads and Airstrip Projects
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The National Land Commission has announced compulsory land acquisition in Meru and Homa Bay amid growing concerns over unpaid government compensation debts.
